profile.name: Sourav Pattanaik
profile.subTagline: I use the lens of bioinformatics to study Biological Phenomena.

pillars.title: Education
bullets: Integrated Master's of Science in Biology with a Minor degree in Chemistry, NISER '26
Competative Exams: NEST (AIR 263), GATE (AIR 1173), OJEE (State Rank 3), OUAT (AIR 81)

pillars.title: Research
bullets: Published article on Multi-epitope vaccine design against structural proteins of Langya Virus
Research project on Sepsis early diagnosis supported by the IAS
Computational Discovery of novel treatment strategy for Testicular Cancer
Recieved Support of ₹4 lakh for Int. MSc program through DAE-DISHA Scholarship (2021-2026)
Check my CV for other achievements and stay tuned for more cool updates

pillars.title: Sports
bullets: Represented University at Inter-IISER Sports meet Basketball (IISM 2023)
Bronze Medals in Inter-batch Badminton (2025) and Football (2024) Competetions

pillars.title: Co-curricular
bullets: Managed ₹50,000 budget as a Gym treasurer (2024-2025)
Student Representative in the Disciplinary Action Committee for Studenys (2025)
Final finalist of BENSPARK Ideathon, IISER Pune

servers.name: qPCR AAS
servers.description: Tired of using slow excel pipeline for your qPCR results? Use our qPCR AAS tool to do it within seconds.

servers.name: DBN Analysis Pro
servers.description: Have the proteomics and genomics data but don't know the best target? Say hello to DBN analysis pro.

academics.title: Attended PK Parija Lecture on Cancer Metastasis by Dr. Rajendra Achyut Badwe
academics.text: Did you know that removing tumors can actually facilitate micrometastasis? Got the Opportunity to be a part of an amazing lecture where Dr. Badwe adressed the metastasis research through a Clinician's perspective.

academics.title: 9th Semester Poster Presentation
academics.text: If you can't explain it to a fourteen years old, you don't know it yourself!! It was an amazing experience to showcase the MSc research project in front of faculty members from different departments and lovely juniors.

academics.title: 36th Mid year Meeting at Indian Academy of Sciences
academics.text: Finally, got the opportunity to meet a living legend!! During my research project at RRMCH(Bengaluru), I was invited to the mid year meeting at IISC, where I got the opportunity to interact with Dr. A S Kiran Kumar (former Chairperson ISRO), while networking with amazing researchers.

sports.title: First Marathon of 2026
sports.text: Did you know that only less than 5% of the world population can run 10km marathon. So, if you are one among them be proud. What a start for the year!!

sports.title: Interbatch Badminton 2025
sports.text: Last win of the year, won third prize in the Interbatch Badminton tournament December 2025. Attacking isn't always the best strategy against Pros!!

sports.title: Powerlifting Competetion
sports.text: Its that time of the year!! Organized Power lifting competetion in the Institute as a core committee member, while also motivating new gym buddies(juniors). Hopefully they show up regularly

cocurricular.title: Group Dance Winners 2025
cocurricular.text: First time it felt nice, so we had to do it twice!! Won the Interbatch Group Dance Competetion. The memories we made during practice sessions are surely going to stay with me till the end.

cocurricular.title: Slogan Writing Winner 2025
cocurricular.text: Writing slogans has become a part of me. It just genuinely feels good to spread awareness and positivity through slogans.
